query:
SELECT 
  JSON_KEYS(payload) as top_level_keys,
  JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams')) as teams_count,
  JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.members')) as members_count,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.settings.draftSettings.pickOrder') as pick_order,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.seasonId') as season_id
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season = 2026 AND viewName = 'combined' 
LIMIT 1;

  JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.teams')) as teams_count,
  JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.members')) as members_count,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.settings.draftSettings.pickOrder') as pick_order,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.seasonId') as season_id
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season = 2026 AND viewName = 'combined' 
LIMIT 1;
